title: Fuel Crisis Threatens Charity Organisation ‘Meals On Wheels’ | 10 News+
description: The fuel crisis is threatening to put the brakes on Meals on Wheels. The organisation feeds more than 200,000 vulnerable Australians. It has had to boost the fuel allowance it offers to its volunteer drivers by around 20 per cent, but that's hitting the charity's bottom line. description: There are fresh warnings for Australians in Dubai tonight as the government issues an update for travellers and expats.  The Smart Traveller website says it has reason to believe the area around Le Meridian Hotel near the airport is under ongoing threat.

title: Tiger Woods Arrested On DUI Charges After Florida Car Crash | 10 News
description: Golf legend Tiger Woods has been arrested on a charge of driving under the influence after a car crash near his Florida home, where he reportedly refused to give a urine test.  The 15-times major champion had been overtaking a work truck pulling a trailer at high speed when he clipped the back of the trailer, causing his Land Rover to roll onto its driver's side.  The 50-year-old was forced to crawl out of his luxury SUV before emergency services arrived on the scene, and neither driver suffered injuries.  Woods was arrested and charged with DUI, property damage and refusal to submit to a lawful test.
